name: CWSI - GoToWebinar <-> SF Webinar Campaign Match (2026)

parameters.content:
## GTW <-> SF webinar MATCH (2026)

Joins both probes: fetch all 2026 GoToWebinar webinars + all 2026 SF Type='Webinar' campaigns, then output the campaign_key <-> webinar_key map.

### Join key (confirmed from live data, 20 Jun)
Campaign.StartDate matches 0/4 (it's the campaign WINDOW-OPEN date). The real webinar date is the dd.mm.yyyy in Campaign.Name and that == GTW start_date (3/4); the 4th (no date in name) resolves uniquely by title + GTW date within [StartDate,EndDate].

### Match Webinars node
1. Drop GTW dry-runs / run-throughs / tests (5 of 9 in 2026).
2. Primary: name-date (dd.mm.yyyy from Campaign.Name) == GTW start_date.
3. Fallback: title-token overlap + GTW date in [StartDate,EndDate].
Output: matched rows (sf_start_date / name_date / gtw_start_date side-by-side) + any unmatched either side + summary. Reproduces 4/4 on live data.

### AFTER IMPORT
1. Select your GoToWebinar OAuth2 credential on 'Get Webinars'.
2. Salesforce cred is preset on 'SF: Get Webinar Campaigns' (Salesforce account 2).
3. Execute. Open 'Match Webinars' output.

Read-only: no DB writes. Next: feed campaign_key<->webinar_key into the GTW attendance ingest (fact_event_daily).

nodes.name: Get Webinars
nodes.notes: Select your predefined GoToWebinar OAuth2 API credential.

parameters.query: SELECT Id, Name, Type, Status, StartDate, EndDate FROM Campaign WHERE Type = 'Webinar' AND StartDate >= 2026-01-01 ORDER BY StartDate
